description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the xldrkp/pandoc_23_auto Docker image. Add a single job called build (default stage) that executes `pandoc *.md -o bericht.pdf` then `pandoc *.md -o bericht.odt`, and publishes any generated *.pdf and *.odt files as artifacts. No caches, services, variables, or conditional rules are required.
